message:
🐛 Add NetworkPolicy, PDB, and securityContext defaults to Helm chart (#1944)

- Add NetworkPolicy template (disabled by default)
- Add PodDisruptionBudget template (disabled by default)
- Set securityContext defaults: runAsNonRoot, readOnlyRootFilesystem, drop ALL

Fixes #1913

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -26,7 +26,12 @@ podLabels: {}
 
 podSecurityContext: {}
 
-securityContext: {}
+securityContext:
+  runAsNonRoot: true
+  readOnlyRootFilesystem: true
+  capabilities:
+    drop:
+      - ALL
 
 service:
   type: ClusterIP
@@ -153,5 +158,12 @@ tolerations: []
 
 affinity: {}
 
+networkPolicy:
+  enabled: false
+
+podDisruptionBudget:
+  enabled: false
+  minAvailable: 1
+
 # Additional environment variables
 extraEnv: []
